title: 10 Facts About Payment Gateways for Cameroon Digital Products That Change How You Sell — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a digital creator based in Cameroon, selling ebooks, courses, or templates online. But PayPal, Stripe, and other popular payment gateways block your account, citing 'geographic restrictions' or 'KYC requirements.' You're left scrambling to find alternative payment solutions that don't exist in Cameroon. This post changes everything. We'll share 10 game-changing facts about payment gateways for Cameroonian digital products that make selling internationally a breeze—without relying on PayPal or other blocked platforms.
The Full List With Context

Cameroon has limited payment options, but blockchain-based gateways like NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect can process transactions in over 300 cryptocurrencies, including BTC, ETH, and USDT. These gateways don't require KYC or a buyer account, making them ideal for creators in restricted countries. By integrating Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) into your digital product store, you can accept crypto payments directly from your customers, eliminating the need for intermediaries and reducing transaction fees. This is a game-changer for Cameroonian creators looking to sell their digital products internationally.
Why Each Item on This List Matters

The list highlights the importance of choosing a payment gateway that caters to your specific needs as a Cameroonian digital creator. You need a solution that can handle international transactions, is not blocked by PayPal or other platforms, and doesn't require a bank account or KYC verification. By focusing on these key factors, you can ensure a seamless payment experience for your customers and increase your chances of making sales online.
The Ones Most Creators Get Wrong

Many creators mistakenly believe that they need to rely on PayPal or other popular payment gateways to sell their digital products internationally. However, this is a costly mistake, as these platforms often block accounts from restricted countries or impose high transaction fees. By choosing a blockchain-based payment gateway like NOWPayments or Web3 Wallet Connect, you can avoid these pitfalls and focus on growing your business.
Don't rely on PayPal or other blocked platforms to sell your digital products in Cameroon.
How to Prioritise What to Implement First

To get started, focus on integrating a blockchain-based payment gateway like Web3 Wallet Connect into your digital product store. This will enable you to accept crypto payments directly from your customers and reduce transaction fees. From there, you can explore other options, such as using a crypto-friendly bank account or implementing a fiat-to-crypto gateway. By prioritizing the most critical steps first, you can ensure a smooth transition to a more efficient payment system.
Putting the List Into Action

To put the list into action, start by exploring blockchain-based payment gateways like NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect. Integrate Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) into your digital product store and test it with a small transaction. This will ensure that the integration is smooth and that you're ready to accept crypto payments from your customers. Once you've confirmed the integration, you can start promoting your products and services to a wider audience, knowing that you have a reliable payment system in place.
